name: Sauce Bearnaise
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the peppercorns.
2. Combine with the wine, vinegar, shallots, tarragon, chervil and parsley in the top of a double boiler.
3. Cook over direct heat until reduced by half.
4. Strain the mixture and allow to cool.
5. Beat briskly, over not-in-hot water, add the egg yolks and butter alternating between them.
6. Beat steadily so that all ingredients are combined.
7. Season to taste.
8. The sauce should have the consistency of Hollandaise sauce.
